content.problemStatement:
Given an array of strings, find the second most frequently occurring word. It is guaranteed that each word in the array has a unique frequency (no two words appear the same number of times). If there is only one unique word in the array, return -1.


Input Format

First line contains TTT - number of test cases
For each test case:

First line contains NNN - length of array
Second line contains NNN space-separated strings




Output Format

For each test case:

Print the second most frequent word
If no such word exists, print -1

sampleTestCases.input:
2
3
aa bb aa
6
a b b c a a

hidden.input:
2
3
aa bb aa
6
a b b c a a
